title: isotrema longlinense
side_effects: Isotrema longlinense can have side effects if used improperly, such as headaches, skin irritation, and increased sensitivity to the sun. Other potential side effects include nausea, dizziness, and changes in vision. In severe cases, long-term use or high doses of the plant may lead to more serious health issues, including birth defects and liver damage. Improper use of isotrema longlinense can also exacerbate existing conditions, such as anxiety and depression, in some individuals.
